frontMatter.title: GL.iNet Slate 7 Pro Review: The Ultimate Wi-Fi 7 Travel Router

frontMatter.summary: Secure your travel data with the GL.iNet Slate 7 Pro, featuring Wi-Fi 7, touchscreen controls, and blazing VPN speeds.
